title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils to Alleviate Asthmatic Cough
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils, also known as ginger essential oil, is commonly used to help soothe a cough. It contains properties like beta-caryophyllene and geranial, which have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These constituents help to break down mucus in the lungs, making it easier to expel, and reduce inflammation in the throat, which can cause a cough.
